novel_features.name: Morning Brief
novel_features.description: Current conditions + today's forecast + active alerts in one glance — zero args after setup
novel_features.rationale: Combines Open-Meteo forecast with NWS alerts in a single output no existing tool provides

novel_features.name: Activity Verdicts
novel_features.description: GO/CAUTION/STOP verdicts for walk, bike, hike, commute, and drive based on weather thresholds
novel_features.rationale: Mechanical threshold checks across temp, wind, AQI, lightning, visibility — no existing weather CLI provides activity-specific verdicts

novel_features.name: Is This Normal?
novel_features.description: Compare today's weather to the 30-year historical average — see if this temperature is unusual
novel_features.rationale: Requires Open-Meteo archive API for historical comparison no CLI does

novel_features.name: Compare Locations
novel_features.description: Side-by-side forecast for two locations to help choose where to go
novel_features.rationale: Two parallel Open-Meteo calls with tabulated comparison

novel_features.name: Air Quality Brief
novel_features.description: Combined AQI + pollen + UV with outdoor exercise recommendation
novel_features.rationale: Open-Meteo air quality endpoint has all fields; mechanical threshold assessment
